headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Smurfit WestRock, Lowers Price Target to $53
summary: Citigroup  analyst Anthony Pettinari   maintains Smurfit WestRock (NYSE:SW) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $59 to $53.
